title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0400
summary: Rajwinder Singh was arrested for possessing 1450 tablets of Tramadol Hydrochloride, amounting to 577.94 grams—classified as commercial quantity under NDPS Act. He remained in custody for over 2 years and 5 months, with only 2 out of 8 witnesses examined.
